title: Aureline debug-session truth, posture, process / thread tree, frame stack, variables / watch / REPL, and action-authority record
description: Boundary schema for the debug_session_record every debug surface (debugger UI, support bundle, replay / import probe, release-evidence reviewer) reads when it needs to answer 'is this a live session under our control, an inspect-only live overlay, a captured dump, a restored session, or an imported evidence-only session, what is the stopped state, what is the process / thread / frame tree, what does the variables / watch / evaluate / REPL rail look like, and what authority does restart / rerun / reattach / reopen-dump carry?'. The schema composes with - and never re-mints - the run / attempt / artifact-event records (schemas/execution/run.schema.json, schemas/execution/attempt.schema.json, schemas/execution/artifact_event.schema.json), the execution-context root (schemas/runtime/execution_context.schema.json), the terminal-session truth contract (schemas/execution/terminal_session.schema.json), the debug artifact manifest (schemas/debug/debug_artifact_manifest.schema.json), the mapping-quality record (schemas/execution/mapping_quality.schema.json), the crash-dump card (schemas/execution/crash_dump_card.schema.json), the trust-decision packet (ADR-0018), the identity-mode envelope (ADR-0001), the admin-policy epoch, the secret-broker credential-handle classes (ADR-0007), the command-dispatch descriptor (ADR-0016), and the collaboration session-authority contract's shared_terminal_control_metadata row. Raw register state, raw memory bytes, raw stack-frame argv, raw evaluation values, raw watch expressions, raw REPL histories, raw command lines, raw env bodies, raw API request / response bodies, raw absolute paths, raw URLs, raw secret values, and raw stack traces MUST NOT cross any of these boundaries; records carry refs, hashes, counts, and class labels only. Adding a new enum member, a new optional field, or a new sub-record kind is additive-minor with a debug_session_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing member is breaking and requires a new decision row.

debug_session_schema_version.description: Document-level schema version. Bumped on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields and new enum members do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in support / evidence / replay exports. Raw absolute paths, raw URLs, raw symbol bytes, and raw register state never appear here.

opaque_ref.description: Opaque ref to another record (run_record, attempt_record, debug_artifact_entry_record, mapping_quality_record, crash_dump_card_record, command-dispatch descriptor, trust-decision packet, etc.). Consumers resolve refs through the owning registry.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 UTC timestamp captured from a monotonic clock source.

short_sentence.description: Short reviewer-facing sentence. Raw command lines, raw env bodies, raw secret values, raw API bodies, and raw stack traces MUST NOT appear here.

redaction_class.description: Redaction posture for the record. metadata_and_hashes_only is the default; broadened_capture requires an explicit approval-ticket ref.

host_boundary_class.description: Re-export of schemas/execution/run.schema.json#host_boundary_class. Every non-local boundary MUST cite a remote target-identity witness ref. host_boundary_unknown_requires_review fails closed.

debug_posture_class.description: Closed debug-posture vocabulary. launch_* postures own the inferior lifetime; attach_* postures attached to a pre-existing process. live_shared_* postures ride a shared-debug overlay; inspect-only is the default and the temporary_step_grant variant requires an explicit grant on the parent shared-control metadata row. captured_dump / restored_session / imported_session postures are inspect-only; restart / rerun / reattach / step / continue / pause / set-breakpoint MUST resolve to typed denials. debug_posture_unknown_requires_review fails closed and forbids any mutating action.

stopped_state_class.description: Closed stopped-state vocabulary. running_no_stopped_thread MUST imply empty frame_stack_refs on every thread (frames are not navigable while running). stopped_at_exception_or_signal MUST cite an exception_summary_ref on the stopped thread. Captured / restored / imported sessions MUST report stopped_at_*; they MUST NOT report running_no_stopped_thread. stopped_state_unknown_requires_review fails closed.

process_role_class.description: Closed process-role vocabulary. process_root_target_inferior is the primary target. process_child_inferior covers child processes the debugger followed under follow-fork-mode. process_attached_external_process covers a pre-existing process the debugger attached to. process_managed_worker covers a managed-runtime worker (e.g. a forked notebook kernel).

thread_role_class.description: Closed thread-role vocabulary. Renderers MUST narrow the thread chip to the matching class rather than minting per-platform thread labels.

frame_kind_class.description: Closed frame-kind vocabulary. frame_user_source is workspace-owned source. frame_user_generated_source is workspace-owned generated source (codegen, OpenAPI, protobuf). frame_third_party_dependency rides through an imported-dependency mapping. frame_runtime_or_kernel covers runtime / OS frames. frame_inlined_into_caller MUST cite the parent frame ref. frame_disasm_only_no_source admits no source mapping. frame_kind_unknown_requires_review fails closed.

evaluation_state_class.description: Closed evaluation-state vocabulary for variables / watches. watch_evaluation_held_pending_purity_confirmation pairs with evaluation_purity_unknown_requires_explicit_confirmation; the renderer prompts before re-resolving. watch_evaluation_blocked_under_purity_unknown is the typed denial when the user declined to confirm. watch_evaluation_redacted_under_redaction_class admits the value was redacted by class. watch_evaluation_state_unknown_requires_review fails closed.

evaluation_side_effect_class.description: Closed evaluation side-effect vocabulary. evaluation_admitted_unsafe_irreversible_under_explicit_consent is the typed answer for an evaluation the user explicitly admitted under a fresh command-dispatch descriptor; once any row resolves to this value the parent session's auto_rerun_admitted_on_this_record locks false. evaluation_purity_unknown_requires_explicit_confirmation holds the row pending typed confirmation. Captured / restored / imported sessions MUST NOT admit evaluation_admitted_unsafe_*.

value_summary_class.description: Closed value-summary vocabulary. Raw values never cross this boundary. value_no_summary_secret_or_redacted is required whenever credential_handle_class_refs is non-empty.

repl_history_entry_class.description: Closed REPL / Evaluate entry vocabulary. repl_entry_admitted_with_explicit_unsafe_consent MUST cite a command_dispatch_descriptor_ref. The REPL log is append-only; replacing or eliding an entry is a typed denial.

symbol_strip_class.description: Closed symbol-strip vocabulary. symbols_full_present is the unstripped baseline. symbols_split_external_resolved / *_missing distinguish a split-debug-info layout where the external symbols package was found vs missing. symbols_minimal_strip_only_line_tables admits line tables but no full symbol index. symbols_fully_stripped_no_symbols is the honest answer for fully-stripped binaries. symbol_strip_class_unknown_requires_review fails closed.

source_map_strip_class.description: Closed source-map-strip vocabulary for JS / TS / CSS / generated frames. source_map_digest_mismatch is the load-bearing 'mapping is stale' answer; renderers MUST surface the typed mismatch chip rather than silently using the mapping.

exception_class_label.description: Closed exception-class vocabulary the stopped thread carries when stopped_state_class is stopped_at_exception_or_signal. Raw exception messages, raw signal payloads, and raw fault addresses MUST NOT appear here.

credential_handle_class_refs.description: Refs to credential-handle classes (ADR-0007) the value / expression intersects. Non-empty rows MUST resolve value_summary_class to value_no_summary_secret_or_redacted.

restart_authority_class.description: Closed authority vocabulary for the 'Restart' affordance. Captured / restored / imported postures MUST resolve to restart_denied_dump_or_restored_session_inspect_only. A run that published an irreversible side effect MUST resolve to restart_denied_irreversible_side_effect_published.

rerun_authority_class.description: Closed authority vocabulary for the 'Rerun' affordance. Mints a new run and a fresh debug session under a fresh command-dispatch descriptor when admitted.

reattach_authority_class.description: Closed authority vocabulary for the 'Reattach' affordance. Captured / restored / imported postures MUST resolve to reattach_denied_dump_or_restored_session_inspect_only.

reopen_dump_authority_class.description: Closed authority vocabulary for the 'Reopen dump' affordance. Always inspect-only; opens a fresh debug_session_record citing the new dump's crash_dump_card_record.

denial_reason_class.description: Closed denial-reason vocabulary for debug_session_record refusals. Every refusal fails closed and cites exactly one value.

audit_event_id.description: Closed audit-event id vocabulary for the debug-session family. Raw register state, raw memory bytes, raw evaluation values, raw watch expressions, raw REPL histories, raw command lines, raw env bodies, raw API request / response bodies, raw absolute paths, raw URLs, raw secret values, and raw stack traces MUST NOT appear on any audit event.

symbol_strip_summary.description: Compact roll-up of the per-module symbol-strip and per-asset source-map-strip vocabulary. Lets a reviewer answer 'how many modules have full symbols vs are stripped' without resolving every frame.

command_dispatch_descriptor_ref.description: Optional ref to a fresh command-dispatch descriptor required for any *_admitted_under_command_dispatch_descriptor value. Null when every authority resolves to a denial.

action_authority_summary.description: Compact projection of the four debug-action authorities. Renderers MUST resolve every Restart / Rerun / Reattach / Reopen-dump affordance through this summary; the session record never mints authority by itself.

display_label.description: Short redaction-safe module label (e.g. 'aureline-shell.exe', 'libcore-1.84.0.so', 'renderer.main.bundle.js'). Raw absolute paths and raw URLs never appear here.

debug_artifact_ref.description: Ref to the debug_artifact_entry_record (schemas/debug/debug_artifact_manifest.schema.json) describing this module's symbols / source map / sibling artifacts.

module_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the module-identity row (PDB debug-id, Mach-O UUID, GNU build-id, source-map digest).

is_external_dependency.description: Whether the module is an external dependency (third-party library, OS framework). Renders as the 'imported' chip on the modules pane.

exact_build_identity_ref.description: Ref to the exact_build_identity row this module joins to. Null for modules whose build identity is unknown / pending / external.

frame_index.description: 0-based index of the frame within its thread's frame stack, outermost-first. Frame 0 is the topmost (most recent) frame.

display_label.description: Short redaction-safe frame label (e.g. 'aureline_shell::main', 'render_loop', 'serde::de::Deserialize::deserialize'). Raw absolute paths, raw URLs, and raw stack-frame argv MUST NOT appear here.

module_summary_ref.description: Ref to the debug_module_summary_record this frame's instruction pointer resolves through.

mapping_quality_record_ref.description: Ref to the mapping_quality_record (schemas/execution/mapping_quality.schema.json) the frame uses to resolve 'Go to source'.

inlined_into_caller_frame_ref.description: Required non-null when frame_kind_class is frame_inlined_into_caller. Renderers MUST preserve the inlined relationship rather than collapsing it.

exception_summary_ref.description: Optional ref to the exception summary row when this frame is the throwing frame. Null otherwise.

thread_index.description: 0-based per-process thread index. Thread 0 is conventionally the main thread.

display_label.description: Short redaction-safe thread label (e.g. 'main', 'renderer::raster', 'tokio-runtime-worker'). Raw absolute paths and raw URLs never appear here.

exception_summary_ref.description: Required non-null when stopped_state_class is stopped_at_exception_or_signal. Null otherwise.

frame_stack_refs.description: Ordered refs to debug_frame_record rows for this thread, outermost-first. MUST be empty when stopped_state_class is running_no_stopped_thread.

allOf.description: Running threads MUST NOT carry frame stacks (frames are not navigable while running).

display_label.description: Short redaction-safe process label (e.g. 'aureline-shell', 'renderer #2', 'jupyter-kernel:python3'). Raw absolute paths and raw URLs never appear here.

parent_process_ref.description: Ref to the parent debug_process_record when this process is a follow-fork child. Null for the root inferior.

thread_refs.description: Ordered refs to debug_thread_record rows for this process.

module_summary_refs.description: Refs to debug_module_summary_record rows for every module loaded into this process.

frame_ref.description: Ref to the debug_frame_record this variable's scope belongs to.

display_label.description: Short redaction-safe variable label (e.g. 'self', 'request', 'config'). Raw evaluation values and raw secrets MUST NOT appear here.

scope_kind_class.description: Closed scope-kind vocabulary. Renderers narrow the scope chip to the matching class.

mapping_quality_record_ref.description: Optional ref to a mapping_quality_record when 'Go to source / declaration' is admissible for this variable.

expression_ref.description: Opaque ref to the canonical expression record. Raw expression bytes never cross this boundary; consumers resolve the ref through the expression registry.

frame_ref.description: Optional ref to the debug_frame_record at the time of evaluation. Null when the watch is global / not bound to a frame.

command_dispatch_descriptor_ref.description: Required non-null when evaluation_side_effect_class is evaluation_admitted_unsafe_irreversible_under_explicit_consent. Null otherwise.

mapping_quality_record_ref.description: Optional ref to a mapping_quality_record when 'Go to source / declaration' is admissible for this watch.

repl_index.description: 0-based monotonic index within the parent debug_session_record's REPL history. The REPL log is append-only; replacing a prior entry is a typed denial.

expression_ref.description: Opaque ref to the canonical expression record.

frame_ref.description: Optional ref to the debug_frame_record at the time of evaluation.

command_dispatch_descriptor_ref.description: Required non-null when repl_history_entry_class is repl_entry_admitted_with_explicit_unsafe_consent. Null otherwise.

debug_session_record_id.description: Opaque, stable id for one debug session. Debugger UI, support bundle, and release-evidence surfaces resolve this id field-for-field rather than minting a per-surface id.

parent_run_ref.description: Ref to the parent run_record (schemas/execution/run.schema.json) this debug session attaches to. Captured / restored / imported sessions cite the originating run when known.

parent_attempt_ref.description: Ref to the parent attempt_record (schemas/execution/attempt.schema.json) for live sessions. Null on captured / restored / imported sessions whose parent attempt is not active.

originating_run_ref.description: Optional ref to the originating run_record when this session is captured / restored / imported. Null otherwise.

command_dispatch_descriptor_ref.description: Ref to the ADR-0016 command-dispatch entry that opened this session. Restart / rerun / reattach / reopen-dump authority resolves through this descriptor.

remote_target_identity_witness_ref.description: Required non-null when host_boundary_class is one of the remote / managed / provider / compatibility-bridge / ai-sandbox classes.

container_target_identity_ref.description: Required non-null when host_boundary_class is container_local_runtime or devcontainer_runtime.

execution_context_root_ref.description: Ref to the ADR-0009 execution-context root the session resolved through.

trust_state_ref.description: Ref to the ADR-0018 trust-decision record governing this session at capture time.

identity_mode_ref.description: Ref to the ADR-0001 identity-mode envelope at capture time.

admin_policy_epoch_ref.description: Ref to the admin-policy epoch in force at capture time. Null only in identity_mode = account_free_local with no policy pack bound.

shared_terminal_control_metadata_ref.description: Required non-null when debug_posture_class is debug_posture_live_shared_inspect_only or debug_posture_live_shared_with_temporary_step_grant. Null otherwise.

temporary_step_grant_ref.description: Required non-null when debug_posture_class is debug_posture_live_shared_with_temporary_step_grant. Cites the explicit grant row on the parent shared-control metadata. Null on every other posture.

process_refs.description: Ordered refs to debug_process_record rows. The first entry is the root inferior; child / attached / managed-worker processes follow.

variables_view_refs.description: Ordered refs to debug_variable_record rows currently materialised for the focused frame. Empty for sessions without a focused frame.

watch_refs.description: Ordered refs to debug_watch_record rows that survive frame changes.

repl_history_refs.description: Append-only ordered refs to debug_repl_entry_record rows. Replacing or eliding an entry is a typed denial under debug_session_record_must_not_admit_silent_overwrite_of_repl_history.

crash_dump_card_ref.description: Required non-null when debug_posture_class is debug_posture_captured_dump_no_live_control or debug_posture_imported_session_evidence_only with a dump-bound originating capture. Null otherwise.

auto_rerun_admitted_on_this_record.description: MUST be false on every record whose debug_posture_class is captured / restored / imported / unknown, whose parent run's latest outcome carried side_effects_irreversible_action_published, or whose REPL / watch rail resolved any evaluation_admitted_unsafe_* row. The contract forbids silent rerun under those conditions; an explicit user-initiated fresh run under a fresh command-dispatch descriptor is the only path back to a new debug session.

audit_event_refs.description: Ordered refs to audit-event ids drawn from this schema's audit_event_id vocabulary. Raw bodies never appear.

denial_reason_class.description: Closed denial reason when the record is published as a typed refusal. Null on admitted records.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Required when redaction_class is broadened_capture. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: Non-local host boundaries MUST cite the matching target-identity witness.
Container / devcontainer host boundaries MUST cite the container target identity.
Captured / restored / imported postures MUST deny restart and reattach.
Live shared sessions MUST cite the shared-terminal-control metadata ref.
Live shared sessions with a temporary step grant MUST cite the explicit grant ref.
Captured-dump posture MUST cite a crash_dump_card_ref.
Running sessions never carry stopped-state-only conditions.
